summary: Completed re-testing of Bhojpe POS SaaS system after RBAC permission fix. Backend RBAC is working perfectly (100% success). Frontend shows correct role-based sidebar restrictions with minor frontend-backend permission mapping discrepancies.

integration_issues.issue: Waiter role frontend sidebar doesn't show Orders and Reservations links, but backend APIs work correctly for these endpoints
integration_issues.note: Backend permissions work correctly - this is just a frontend display issue

passed_tests: All authentication for 4 user roles (admin, waiter, chef, cashier)
Backend health check and user profile endpoints
RBAC dotted permissions fix - waiter can access /api/orders (orders.view, orders.create)
RBAC dotted permissions fix - chef can access /api/orders (orders.view)
RBAC dotted permissions fix - cashier can access /api/customers (customers.view)
RBAC dotted permissions fix - waiter can access /api/reservations (reservations.view)
Admin role has full API access to all endpoints
Permission denials work correctly (chef denied customers, staff access)
Menu access for all roles works correctly
Order creation by waiter role works correctly
Chef sidebar correctly shows only Dashboard and Kitchen (as required)
Waiter sidebar shows Dashboard, POS, Tables (proper restrictions applied)
Role-based dashboard loading and data visualization
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor frontend improvement: Update frontend sidebar navigation to show Orders and Reservations links for waiter role to match backend RBAC permissions. Backend RBAC is working perfectly - all dotted permission fixes are successful.
